meaning: n.[生]大量养料,大量营养素 常量营养元素
examples: Calcium is an essential macronutrient for plants and functions in signal transduction.
The first type of nutrient is called a “macronutrient”, which refers to any nutrient that our body needs in large quantities in order to stay alive.
The serving sizes of the foods in each list (starches, fruits, milks, vegetables, meats and fats) reflect the mean macronutrient and energy values for each of the groups in this database.
